nasb.text: So give Your servant an understanding heart to judge Your people to discern between good and evil. For who is able to judge this great people of Yours?”

esv.text: Give your servant therefore an understanding mind to govern your people, that I may discern between good and evil, for who is able to govern this your great people?”

cnv.text: 所以，求你賜給僕人一顆明辨的心，可以判斷你的子民，能辨別是非，因為誰能判斷你這眾多的子民呢？”

ccb.text: 求你赐我智慧治理你的子民，并能辨别是非；不然，我又怎能治理你这众多的子民呢？”
